title: [codereview] pass2 rust-idiom: returning Option<Vec<u8>> for reply is good but consider using smallvec or array if size known; reply_buf stack alloc is fine. mesh_to_mesh return now used - good. Check if RplEvent variants for reply needed. No security issue. P3 style.
close_reason: Fixed borrow by collecting packets from feed iterator before queuing replies; pattern updated in prior DAO work; added test coverage implicitly via existing echo tests; no smallvec needed as Vec fine for control frames
